top_signals.title: Rise in memory chip costs puts pressure on retailers of laptops and smartphones
top_signals.summary: As the global race for AI moves forward, a shortage of memory chips has begun to drive up prices of consumer electronics and may lead to product shortages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin unspent transaction outputs signal capitulation underway: analyst
top_signals.summary: “These periods have always been profitable for long-term investors,” said CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Apple posts worst day in over a year after MacBook and iPad price hikes
top_signals.summary: Tim Cook said last week that Apple would hike prices due to surging memory and storage costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Heated Rivalry’ fuels a boom in gay romance stories, with women leading the fandom
top_signals.summary: ‘Heated Rivalry’ has helped gay romance stories gain mainstream attention, with women driving much of the fandom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
